headline: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release dominates the window, driving Claude and function calling to the top while drawing a guardrails backlash.
body: Claude Fable 5 anchors the day's activity through its tier routing system, agentic coding workflows, and a developer event in Tokyo, with Claude and function calling leading momentum. The release is contested: users report the model refusing harmless prompts and triggering false safety alarms, raising questions about invisible guardrails and whether they receive a downgraded model. Separately, Model Context Protocol enters as a new technique alongside API integration and client-server communication, surfacing in Google Cloud agent tutorials and a $20,000 API key incident. IBM Technology also flags Apple's shift away from on-device AI toward an NVIDIA cloud compute partnership announced at WWDC 2026.
